params._payInZRO: Whether to pay in ZRO token

params._destination: The address on destination chain (in bytes)
params._refundAddress: Address to refund excess gas payment
params._zroPaymentAddress: Address of ZRO token holder for fee payment

estimateFees(uint16,address,bytes,bool,b.notice: Estimate fees for sending a message

forceResumeReceive(uint16,bytes).notice: Force resume receiving from a source

getInboundNonce(uint16,bytes).notice: Get the inbound nonce for a source chain

getOutboundNonce(uint16,address).notice: Get the outbound nonce for a destination chain

hasStoredPayload(uint16,bytes).notice: Check if there's a stored payload

send(uint16,bytes,bytes,address,address,.notice: Send a LayerZero message to a destination chain

setReceiveVersion(uint16).notice: Set the receive messaging library version

setSendVersion(uint16).notice: Set the send messaging library version
